title: Pricing Plans
description: Choose the plan that's right for your wedding planning business.

free.name: Free
free.description: For individuals just starting out with wedding planning.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: For established wedding planners with a growing business.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For professional wedding planners with multiple clients.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan later?
faq.a1: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. When you upgrade, you'll be charged the prorated amount for the remainder of your billing cycle. When you downgrade, the new plan will take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.
faq.q2: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a2: We accept all major credit cards, including Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover. We also accept PayPal for payment.
faq.q3: Is there a contract or commitment?
faq.a3: No, all plans are month-to-month or year-to-year with no long-term commitment. You can cancel at any time and your plan will remain active until the end of your current billing cycle.
